title: M4 — Signal engine + sizing + state + live Sharpe

why: The decision engine ties card + window -> target position reusing pipeline building blocks; Kelly sizing (B0001) finally wired to live with tier multiplier; crash-safe state persistence; live Sharpe replicating the strategy_metrics sqrt(trades_per_year) invariant.

history.reason: Superseded by the no-alpha survival-book pivot. The meta signal_engine (features->primary->meta->threshold) and Kelly sizing are NOT used (no meta, no Kelly -- survival book sizes by inverse-vol/vol-target). The sub-scope that DID matter was delivered separately: execution/state.py LiveState (atomic, idempotent, crash-safe, restart-tested in test_state_recovery/test_live_state). Equity curve persisted; a dedicated live_sharpe() was not needed.
